name: Quarterly Pipeline Review
description: Quarterly review of pipeline state, written for board and executive audiences. Bottom line first, supporting detail second. Replaces 1–2 days of RevOps board-prep per cycle.
alsoSurfaces: What does open pipeline look like, and are we on track to land the number?
What's the single most important risk to call out?
Which large deals or segments shifted materially this quarter?
What should leadership watch in the next quarter?
beforeWeRun: Quarter to review: current, or last completed (auto-detect if within 7 days of quarter close)?
Audience tone: board (concise, financial, risk-forward) or internal-leadership (more tactical)?
Include rep-level detail: yes for internal-leadership, no for board?

whatYoullGet.name: Executive summary
whatYoullGet.desc: Three to five sentences with open pipeline, coverage ratio, period-over-period direction, and the single most important risk.

whatYoullGet.name: Pipeline state
whatYoullGet.desc: Markdown table: open pipeline, coverage, weighted pipeline, opp count, won-to-date, avg deal size, stage distribution, with PoP deltas.

whatYoullGet.name: Quarter highlights
whatYoullGet.desc: 4–6 bullets: deals won/lost, segment shifts, velocity changes, source mix changes. Mix of positive and negative.

whatYoullGet.name: Risk register
whatYoullGet.desc: Markdown table: risk category, severity, magnitude, recommended attention level (immediate / monitor / informational).

whatYoullGet.name: Forward look
whatYoullGet.desc: Two-paragraph narrative on what to watch next quarter, tied to specific data.

whatYoullGet.name: Sources & definitions
whatYoullGet.desc: Coverage target source, period boundaries, sources read, Stage 0 resolutions.

callout: 5 quick inputs, then Sage drafts your QBR memo in ~16 min.
